elements.name: TextBox 2
elements.template_text:
The Transformation Plan
We’re converting a historic private estate into a boutique destination—purpose-built for Lola & Ber signature programming and year-round service to our community.

paragraphs.text: We’re converting a historic private estate into a boutique destination—purpose-built for Lola & Ber signature programming and year-round service to our community.

cells.text: Indoor gathering spaces + dedicated outdoor venues
